subcodes.first_line: O beloved one! God willing, through the grace of the All-Bountiful, thou mayest be sanctified and purified from human limitations and attain unto the court of Divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز انشاء الله بعنایت کریم از حدودات بشریه مقدس و طاهر شده بساحت احدیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
